item.title: Apache APISIX vs Apigee: Gateway vs API Management Platform
item.description: Compare Apache APISIX and Google Cloud Apigee: an open-source API gateway vs a full enterprise API management platform — scope, cost, and portability.

item.title: Apache APISIX vs AWS API Gateway: Self-Hosted vs Managed
item.description: Compare Apache APISIX and AWS API Gateway: self-hosted open source vs a managed cloud service, pricing at scale, vendor lock-in, and performance.

item.title: Apache APISIX vs Envoy: API Gateway vs Service Proxy
item.description: Compare Apache APISIX and Envoy: a turnkey API gateway with a built-in control plane vs a high-performance proxy that needs one (Istio, Gloo).

item.title: Apache APISIX vs NGINX: API Gateway vs Reverse Proxy
item.description: Compare Apache APISIX and NGINX as API gateways. APISIX is built on NGINX but adds dynamic config, 100+ plugins, and an Admin API; NGINX Plus too.

item.title: Apache APISIX vs Traefik: Performance vs Auto-Discovery
item.description: Compare Apache APISIX and Traefik: APISIX for higher throughput and a larger plugin ecosystem, Traefik for container-native auto-discovery and TLS.

item.title: API Gateway Authentication: Methods, Best Practices & Implementation
item.description: Learn how to implement authentication at the API gateway layer. Covers Key Auth, JWT, OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, mTLS, and HMAC with practical examples.

item.title: API Gateway for Microservices: Architecture, Patterns & Best Practices
item.description: Learn why microservices architectures need an API gateway. Covers service discovery, load balancing, circuit breaking, and API composition patterns.

item.title: API Gateway Rate Limiting: Algorithms, Strategies & Configuration
item.description: Understand API rate limiting at the gateway layer. Covers token bucket, sliding window, and leaky bucket algorithms with practical configuration examples.

item.title: API Gateway Security: Threats, Best Practices & Implementation
item.description: Learn how to secure your API gateway against common threats. Covers authentication, authorization, rate limiting, WAF, IP filtering, and zero-trust architecture.

item.title: API Gateway vs Load Balancer: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Understand the differences between an API gateway and a load balancer. Learn when to use each, how they complement each other, and where they overlap.

item.title: API Monetization: Models, Strategies & Implementation Guide
item.description: Learn how to monetize APIs with proven pricing models. Covers freemium, pay-per-call, tiered pricing, and revenue sharing with practical implementation guidance.

item.title: Apache APISIX vs Kong: Feature Comparison & Performance Benchmarks
item.description: Detailed comparison of Apache APISIX and Kong API Gateway. Covers architecture, performance, plugin ecosystem, Kubernetes support, and when to choose each.

item.title: Kubernetes API Gateway: Gateway API, Ingress Controllers & Best Practices
item.description: Compare Kubernetes Gateway API vs Ingress, understand ingress controllers, and learn how to deploy an API gateway on Kubernetes with Apache APISIX.

item.title: MCP Protocol & AI Gateways: Managing AI Agent Traffic at Scale
item.description: Learn about the Model Context Protocol (MCP), how AI gateways manage LLM and AI agent traffic, and how Apache APISIX bridges MCP servers with enterprise infrastructure.

item.title: Open Source API Gateway Comparison: APISIX vs Kong vs Envoy vs Traefik
item.description: Compare the leading open-source API gateways. Feature-by-feature analysis of Apache APISIX, Kong, Envoy, and Traefik covering architecture, plugins, Kubernetes support, and community.

item.title: What is an API Gateway? Definition, Benefits & Use Cases
item.description: Learn what an API gateway is, how it works, key features like load balancing, authentication, and rate limiting, and why modern architectures need one.

item.title: What is gRPC? Protocol Buffers, Performance & API Gateway Integration
item.description: Understand gRPC, how it compares to REST, its performance advantages, and how to proxy and transform gRPC traffic through an API gateway.

item.title: What is Mutual TLS (mTLS)? How Two-Way Authentication Works
item.description: Learn what mutual TLS is, how it differs from standard TLS, the mTLS handshake process, and how to configure mTLS in API gateways for zero-trust security.
